data.title: Trane Technologies Earnings Report: Q4 Overview
data.description:

Here's what investors need to know about the announcement.

Earnings

Trane Technologies beat estimated earnings by 1.0%, reporting an EPS of $2.86 versus an estimate of $2.82.

Revenue was up $271.00 million from the same period last year.

Analysis of Past Earnings
